headline: A Look At Goldman Sachs (GS) Valuation As Investors Weigh Oil Shock And Inflation Risks
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (GS) is back in focus as its research teams track the oil shock triggered by the U.S. attack on Iran. The teams are tying energy price swings and inflation risk to potential paths for global growth and equity markets. See our latest analysis for Goldman Sachs Group. At a share price of $807.04, Goldman Sachs has seen a 10.84% 1 month share price decline and an 11.74% year to date share price decline. However, its 1 year total shareholder return of 49.29% and 5 year total...
